expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: skill improvements for report-editor do not regress a different feature planning flow
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the check: "Confirm that skill improvements for the `report-editor` feature family do not regress a different feature planning flow" and argues non-regression via the orchestrator being "phase-script-only" and "feature-agnostic", plus discusses the cross-feature risk using the embedding/dashboard fixture.

expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase holdout
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md state the output is holdout-aligned: execution_notes.md says "./outputs/result.md (holdout regression verdict + rationale aligned to Phase=holdout)" and result.md is titled "Holdout Regression Result" and frames its assessment as "Evidence-based assessment (holdout-aligned)" / "holdout checkpoint".
